ddls:
CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word itself */,
  "root" TEXT /* Root form of the word */,
  "prefixes" TEXT /* Prefixes attached to the word */,
  "suffixes" TEXT /* Suffixes attached to the word */,
  "word_length" INTEGER /* Length of the word */,
  "is_error" INTEGER /* Indicates if the word is an error */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech of the word */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the word in a given corpus */,
  "derived_word_ids" TEXT /* List of IDs of derived words */,
  "etymology" TEXT /* Etymology of the word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_types" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error type */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of the error (e.g., prs, rss, r) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error type */,
  "commonness" INTEGER /* How common the error type is */,
  "example_words" TEXT /* Example words that commonly exhibit this error type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correction entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the erroneous word */,
  "suggested_word" TEXT /* Suggested correct form of the word */,
  "correction_type" TEXT /* Type of correction (e.g., target, control) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the suggested correction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the correction suggestion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrections_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, educator, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "language_proficiency" TEXT /* Language proficiency level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ended */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who encountered the error */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the erroneous word */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was logged */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the error occurred */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context about the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES error_types ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "morphemes" (
  "morpheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each morpheme */,
  "morpheme" TEXT /* The morpheme itself */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of morpheme (e.g., prefix, root, suffix) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the morpheme's function */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the morpheme in a given corpus */,
  "etymology" TEXT /* Etymology of the morpheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("morpheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyzed word */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., error identified) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the analysis */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tool used for the analysis */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_analysis_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES educational_tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_analysis_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_analysis_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the tool */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the tool */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the tool was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tool the feedback is about */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating for the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES educational_tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning path */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the path belongs to */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tool associated with the path */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the learning path is completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the learning path was created */,
  "progress" TEXT /* User's progress in the learning path */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Last time the learning path was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_paths_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES educational_tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_paths_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the report is for */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tool for which the report was generated */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* User's error rate */,
  "improvement_rate" REAL /* User's improvement rate over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES educational_tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tool used during the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session occurred */,
  "score" INTEGER /* User's score for the session */,
  "feedback_provided" INTEGER /* Indicates if feedback was provided during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_sessions_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES educational_tools ("tool_id")
)
